How it works

Four steps. No inbox to babysit.

1

Pick your game and timeline

Choose any Switch title. Lock now or up to 90 days out at today's researched price.

2

We find your match

We pair you with a verified buyer or seller at the locked price. No haggling.

3

Meet safely, trade clean

Public Milwaukee meetup spot. Price and condition already agreed. Done.

4

Keep more of your money

Zero platform fees during beta. Sellers always net the full locked price.
